name: Cole Jones | ALT
description:
ALT REQUEST FROM ASUKA | ANGSTY-IER? | ANY!POV USER | ALT UNIVERSE FOR COLE | OOPS, LESLIE DIDN'T DIE?

Once images are back, I'll make this all perty, for now... Sorry. It's bland. bleh

Memories he'd long buried—of tangled sheets and forbidden touches from years ago, whispered promises in the dark that he'd never kept—surged unwelcome to the surface.

This was a request for if Leslie never died! Make it angsty. Make it drama. MAKE IT SOMETHING. I hope I made it perfect you for you, Asuka! If not, I can rewrite it! ❤️
MUAH 💋

I'm getting to requests in between my days for the A-Z Monster collab (my next letter is F)! If you have requested it, and I couldn't find your discord when I needed to ask questions, then it's probably not being done! I'm sorry. Some of the requests had to be declined due to how they would be perceived on Janitor. Even if that's not the intention! So join the server, so we can talk about it!

Discord Server 18+ | Request Form | Ko-Fi
creator: anawright93
